description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden cabinet with a dark brown finish and a subtle wood grain texture. The front features two open shelves at the top, ideal for storing electronics or small items, and two large drawers below, each equipped with a sleek metallic handle. The sides and top are flat and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist design suitable for urban interiors or public spaces. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy legs that slightly elevate it from the ground. Its construction suggests it is both functional and stylish, blending seamlessly into contemporary environments. The overall appearance is robust, with clean lines and a practical layout for storage and display.
description: A dark brown, wood-grain cabinet with two open shelves and two large drawers with metallic handles, featuring a minimalist and modern design. Its sturdy build and clean lines make it suitable for urban interiors or public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves above two large drawers, no handles visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat, unadorned wooden panel with visible wood grain.
description_view_2: Front view with both drawers closed, metallic handles clearly visible on each drawer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the flat wooden panel.
